name: TC-OT-004 — GET /api/v1/token: expires_at is a future ISO 8601 timestamp
description:
**What this test does:**
Parses the expires_at field and confirms it is:
1. A valid ISO 8601 date string
2. Strictly in the future (not already expired)

**Why it matters:** If the cached token is served past its expiry, every call to the KCB API will fail with 401. The service must always return a token that is still valid.
descriptionHtml:
What this test does:
Parses the expires_at field and confirms it is:

  1. A valid ISO 8601 date string
  2. Strictly in the future (not already expired)

Why it matters: If the cached token is served past its expiry, every call to the KCB API will fail with 401. The service must always return a token that is still valid.
